description.zh-Hans: 生成蜂巢/细胞图案（基于可平铺的沃罗诺伊），类似于 Substance 3D Designer 的蜂巢节点。产生柔和的细胞内部，可控制壁宽、羽化和凹凸/脊线。
description.en: Generates an alveolus / cellular pattern (tileable Voronoi-based) similar to Substance 3D Designer's alveolus node. Produces a soft cellular interior with controllable wall width, feather and bump/ridge.

triggers.zh-Hans: 蜂巢, 细胞, 蜂窝, 沃罗诺伊图案, 生物纹理
triggers.en: alveolus, cell pattern, honeycomb, voronoi, cellular texture

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的蜂巢/细胞纹理，用于科幻护甲或生物材质表面。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a tileable honeycomb cellular texture for sci-fi armor or organic material surfaces.
